next_step: 后续所有 brief、汇报和论文草稿都保持这一说法，不再混用 CV 术语。
note: 每个 repeat 都会重新划分、独立训练、独立 early stopping、独立测试；对外表述必须统一成 repeated random hold-out validation。
summary: 当前评估协议不是 k-fold CV，而是 5 次 repeated random hold-out，也就是 5 次重复 train/val/test 随机划分。
title: 评估协议不是 k-fold CV

next_step: 下一轮实验优先围绕 3->2 做主线验证和干净消融，必要时保留 6->3 作为旧框架对照。
note: rollout 最终建议：3->2 是稳定性和性能综合最好的一组；6->1 虽然数字高，但 future_events_mean=0.6，不适合作为主结论；9->1 和 9->3 也不推荐。
summary: 如果优先考虑稳定性，当前窗口主推 3->2；如果必须沿用旧的四窗口框架，才保留 6->3 作为主结果。
title: 窗口推荐以 3->2 为先

next_step: Run a matched-setting ablation on 3->2 and 6->3 first, then add Dynamic-DeepHit under the same repeated random hold-out protocol.
summary: Prioritize a clean matched-setting comparison before broader architecture changes: rerun period_ms, period_ms_tree_query, and period_ms_tree_query with spatial features under the same window set and optimization budget.
title: Decision: Prioritize a clean matched-setting comparison before broader architecture change

title: Decision: Keep the matched period_ms_tree_query comparison non-spatial; do not add tree-po

next_step: Compare trigger_orchard_v2 gamma_ct=1.0 against the scalar-head trigger_orchard baseline using a detach or gating design for the CT branch.
summary: Do not pursue gamma_ct=0.5 further for the trigger_orchard_v2 CT-vector head.
title: Decision: Do not pursue gamma_ct=0.5 further for the trigger_orchard_v2 CT-vector head.

next_step: Compare trigger_orchard_v2 gamma_ct=1.0 against the scalar-head trigger_orchard baseline using a detach or gating design for the CT branch.

title: Decision: Use trigger_orchard_v2 gamma_ct=1.0 only as a ranking-first CT-vector reference;

next_step: Compare trigger_orchard_v2 gamma_ct=1.0 against the scalar-head trigger_orchard baseline using a detach or gating design for the CT branch.
summary: Keep the older trigger_orchard gamma_ct=0.1 run as the balanced scalar-head baseline when comparing future trigger_orchard_v2 CT-supervision variants.
title: Decision: Keep the older trigger_orchard gamma_ct=0.1 run as the balanced scalar-head base

next_step: Use the raw-daily trigger_orchard_v2 branch only as a calibration-oriented control and continue future trigger_orchard_v2 tuning on the agro-expanded daily inputs.
summary: Keep the agro-expanded daily features as the default trigger_orchard_v2 gamma_ct=0.1 input because the raw-daily ablation recovers only limited calibration and CT-fit gains while sacrificing too much ranking, especially on 9->1 and overall mean Ctd.
title: Decision: Keep agro-expanded daily inputs as the default trigger_orchard_v2 branch

next_step: Use an open hourly ICU time-series benchmark first, then fall back to MIMIC-IV only if the paper needs a broader EHR cohort.
summary: For external validation of trigger_orchard_v2, prefer PhysioNet/CinC 2019 Sepsis Challenge or a similar hourly ICU dataset over AASK; if forced to choose between AASK and MIMIC-IV, choose MIMIC-IV because AASK is too coarse and access-heavy for the trigger-window protocol.
title: Decision: Prefer hourly ICU time-series benchmarks for trigger_orchard_v2
